description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure dressed in a fitted hooded jacket and matching pants, giving her a sleek and athletic appearance. The figure's body proportions are realistic, with defined arms, legs, and a slightly tapered waist. Her hands are relaxed at her sides, and her feet are positioned flat on the ground, suggesting a neutral, balanced stance. The hood covers most of her head, with long, straight hair visible at the back and sides. The clothing appears to be form-fitting and seamless, with subtle paneling details on the jacket. The overall look is modern and urban, suitable for a city or street environment.
description: A stylized adult female in a fitted hooded jacket and pants, standing upright with a neutral, balanced posture. The figure has realistic proportions and a sleek, athletic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded jacket, defined waist, and relaxed arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the straight fall of the hair and clothing.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the long, straight hair, the back of the hood, and the fitted nature of the jacket and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the smooth, continuous lines of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic hooded jacket and fitted pants
